summary: Cut repository release 0.177.132 from the exact-main LiveKit source commit 9cad64c634f304bce0e8946529fd9386a67f317e, replayed the governed live-apply-service path for LiveKit across proxmox-host, docker-runtime-lv3, and nginx-lv3, re-verified the public HTTPS and certificate contract at livekit.example.com, and passed both the in-playbook and standalone controller-side room lifecycle probes, which advances platform_version to 0.130.83.

verification.observed: The exact-main release manager status, dry-run, and write paths all succeeded for repository version 0.177.132, with evidence preserved in the matching release-status, release-dry-run, and release-write transcripts.

ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=livekit env=production completed successfully with final recap proxmox-host ok=32 changed=0 failed=0, docker-runtime-lv3 ok=184 changed=4 failed=0, nginx-lv3 ok=46 changed=5 failed=0, and localhost ok=19 changed=0 failed=0.

Independent controller-side probes after the exact-main replay returned HTTP/2 200 for https://livekit.example.com and presented subject CN=livekit.example.com with DNS:livekit.example.com in the SAN set.

The playbook controller-side public room-lifecycle verification passed, and the standalone livekit_tool.py verify-room-lifecycle probe also passed with created=true, listed_after_create=true, deleted=true, and listed_after_delete=false.

The final exact-main tree passed the targeted LiveKit pytest slice (79 passed), validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces/generated-docs/agent-standards, ansible_scope_runner.py validate, live_apply_receipts.py --validate, canonical_truth.py --check, git diff --check, and run_gate_fallback.py for workstream-surfaces/schema-validation/generated-docs/dependency-graph. validate_repo.sh emitted only non-blocking advisory warnings about .config-locations.yaml and .repo-structure.yaml.

The follow-on restic config backup triggered by live-apply-service completed successfully and synced receipts/restic-backups/20260401T141105Z.json plus receipts/restic-snapshots-latest.json back into the repo.

notes: ADR 0293 is now recorded as implemented in repository version 0.177.132 and first verified live in platform version 0.130.83.
The exact-main replay preserved the governed release and live-apply path on top of origin/main commit 4d3ef7d3a61931e0e18e9d74ad97d7511ecb2f7d before the final merge commit was created.
The earlier branch-side converge evidence remains preserved for drift history, but this receipt is the first exact-main authority for the LiveKit publication and public room-lifecycle contract.
